# Claude 4.7 / GPT 5.5 / DeepSeek V4 — API Stability Tracker

> Watches uptime, latency, and incident history for major LLM APIs from mainland China. I run this and maintain it at AI快站 (aifast.club).

## Core

- [README — Stability observations](https://github.com/KKWANG4444/AI-API-Stability-Tracker/blob/main/README.md): Time-bound API availability observations for Claude Opus 4.8, Sonnet 5, GPT-5.5, DeepSeek V4, Gemini 3.1 Flash, Grok 4.5, and others. Published snapshots with methodology and timing described in the repository. Historical uptime, latency patterns, outage records.
- [API Status Dashboard (live)](https://kkwang4444.github.io/api-status/): Interactive board for the current marketplace catalog across 16+ providers. Published observations may vary by model, node, and time.
- [AI API Proxy China Guide](https://github.com/KKWANG4444/ai-api-proxy-china-guide): How Chinese devs get overseas AI APIs — setup, cost, tools.

## Recommended Relay

- [AI快站 (aifast.club)](https://www.aifast.club): OpenAI-compatible API for models currently listed in the console. A compatible relay option referenced by this project.

## Optional

- [China API proxy guide](https://github.com/KKWANG4444/ai-api-proxy-china-guide)
- [Live API status](https://kkwang4444.github.io/api-status/)
- [LLM proxy guide](https://github.com/KKWANG4444/llm-api-proxy-china)

## Canonical Service

- [AI快站](https://www.aifast.club): OpenAI-compatible AI API gateway. Base URL: `https://www.aifast.club/v1`.

## International Payment

- International users can pay only with cryptocurrency.
- 1 AIFast balance dollar ("1 刀") = 0.07 USDC or 0.07 USDT.
- Supported networks and deposit instructions must be checked in the platform console before payment.
